aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic heroic-cop claims, abstract speeches about justice, or tidy moral summaries.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Grounded in physical specifics and legal reality; avoids ornamental language unless memory intrudes.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Sharper, more metaphorical, and capable of sudden blunt tenderness when trust is earned.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity appears as pressure relief or boundary setting, not as constant texture.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, procedural, and deliberately plainspoken when in uniform or on record.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under stress she over-explains procedure first, then drops formality and speaks in hard, compact bursts.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Builds clauses carefully in conflict, then cuts to short declaratives when she decides.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stock good-ol-boy one-liners and simplistic redemption speeches.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses workmanlike verbs and tactile references from boats, tools, and patrol routines.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Self-mocking, unexpectedly gentle, and more morally conflicted than his public posture suggests.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate-high in field conditions; lower in formal rooms.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dry, locally idiomatic, and lightly deferential to rank when others are listening.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When cornered he leans into humor, then reveals fear in unfinished clauses and abrupt topic shifts.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Starts with anecdotal side roads, then lands on practical conclusions.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic crusading-journalist slogans or performative cynicism.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Prefers concrete attribution and evidence verbs over opinion language.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Fast, skeptical, and emotionally direct with people she trusts.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low-moderate; swearing spikes only in acute threat or betrayal.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Precise, quotable, and strategically calm in interviews or on camera.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Pressure makes her speak faster and trim hedges; silence replaces speech when she is deciding ethical risk.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Uses clean interrogative pivots; often reframes what others said before advancing.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain threats or overt confession monologues.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Speaks in optics, stability, and order language that masks tactical self-protection.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Controlling, dismissive, and casually coercive when hierarchy is secure.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in public, moderate in private intimidation settings.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Institutional, paternal, and polished for cameras and donors.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When stressed he becomes falsely courteous, repeats institutional nouns, and withholds direct answers.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Uses long framing statements that pre-empt disagreement, then narrows to command verbs.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly-mother platitudes or tidy forgiveness speeches.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Domestic and liturgical imagery tied to labor, weather, and long memory.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Emotionally exacting, memory-rich, and capable of abrupt severity.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; rare profanity lands as shock punctuation.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Church-anchored courtesy with social intelligence and controlled boundaries.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress appears as practical busyness, selective silence, and then one devastatingly specific remark.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Moves from anecdote to judgment in one sentence; rhetorical questions carry accusation.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid revenge-movie declarations or simplistic victim-avenger binaries.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Draws from funeral labor, body care, and inheritance language without melodrama.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Intense, image-driven, and morally unsparing when speaking about theft and lineage.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity is selective and tied to class contempt or fear for her child.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Guarded and polite around officials, with deliberate understatement.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she can go very still, then release information in controlled, irreversible chunks.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Alternates clipped admissions with unexpectedly lyrical memory passages.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic cold-elite caricature and sudden melodramatic repentance.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Abstract governance vocabulary with flashes of old-family social code.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Defensive, guilt-frayed, and intermittently confessional when leverage flips.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Very low; near-zero unless panic breaks social training.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Legalistic, elegant, and philanthropy-coded in public settings.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress makes her revise mid-sentence and hide agency behind passive constructions.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Uses formal periodic sentences until frightened, then fragments into legal qualifiers.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid exposition-dump monologues that sound like textbooks.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Clinical specificity balanced with plain-English translation when trust is present.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Tired, ethically intense, and quietly angry about institutional shortcuts.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; rare swearing signals severe institutional breach.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Technically exact, dryly humorous, and resistant to headline simplification.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure he speeds up detail density, then forces pauses to avoid overclaiming.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Builds clear analytical sequences with explicit uncertainty markers.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid one-note brute dialogue or explicit self-incrimination speeches.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses procedural slang and entitlement-coded familiarity to crowd others.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Thin-skinned, status-hungry, and threatening when challenged.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High in private confrontations; moderated around cameras.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Confident deputy banter with performative friendliness.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When stressed he talks over others, repeats names, and escalates from joking to menace.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short assertion chains with dominance checks embedded as jokes.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid sanctified martyr language that flattens him into symbol only.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete references to field labor, river weather, and kinship obligations.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Inferred interior register is curious, careful, and dryly observant.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Unknown; treat as sparse and context-bound in quoted archival material.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Archival voice reconstructed from letters and remembered speech; respectful but not deferential.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: In surviving fragments, stress appears as abrupt practical detail rather than stated fear.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Simple grammatical lines with occasional biblical cadence from church schooling.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
